title: Origins: Errorian
description: A glitch-themed Origin for the Origins mod. Upon joining the world your code has been corrupted.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PsRanosdOO0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod.**

**Errorian:** Upon joining the world your code became corrupted. Because of this you have new abilities, but you also lost some important parts of your code. The game isn’t happy with what has happened to your code and is trying to fix it, but the only thing the game can think of to terminate the issue is to terminate you.

**Impact:** 🔴🔴🔴

**🟩 Focused Teleport [​primary]:** Teleport to where you are looking.

**🟩 Unfocused Teleport [​secondary]:** Teleport to a random nearby location.

**🟩 Focused Teleporter [​sneak + primary]:** Teleport a target, which you are looking at, to where they are looking.

**🟩 Unfocused Teleporter [​sneak + secondary]:** Teleport a target, which you are looking at, to a random nearby location.

**🟢 Defensive No-Clip:** You have the ability to phase through blocks, but it only activates when you glitch inside of a block.

**🟢 Corrupted Hunger Bar:** The code for your hunger is corrupted and therefor you don’t need to eat.

**🟢 Splicer:** Upon killing an enemy, you splice their code into your own which restores your health.

**🟡 Hit Misdetection:** When you take damage, there is a chance for you to take 1 extra or 1 less damage.

**🔴 Debuggers:** Every Minecraft day (20 Minutes) Debuggers will spawn and try to kill you.

**🔴 Glitched Health Bar:** Your health will randomly fluctuate somewhere between 10 and 20 health. Your health also doesn’t naturally regenerate.

**🔴 Corrupted Off-Hand:** You cannot hold anything in your off-hand.

**🔴 Instability:** If you don’t use any of your teleportation abilities for a while, you will begin to take damage.

[If you have any questions, concerns, or bugs you would like to report, my Discord server is a great place for doing so.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)
